examples.title: WordCount
examples.code:
textFile = sc.textFile("hdfs://...")
words = textFile.flatMap(line => line.split(" "))
counts = words.map(word => (word, 1)).reduceByKey(_ + _)
counts.saveAsTextFile("output")
examples.explanation: Shows text loading, splitting, mapping, and reducing operations
examples.spaceComplexity: O(k) where k is unique words
